title: Monitor turf health
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Monitor turf health demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for monitoring activities

pcs.text: Establish the scope, regularity and time constraints for monitoring and reporting turf health
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish the scope, regularity and time constraints for monitoring and reporting turf health?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish the scope, regularity and time constraints for monitoring and reporting turf health.

pcs.text: Identify turf grass species and assess common health issues attributed to the species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify turf grass species and assess common health issues attributed to the species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify turf grass species and assess common health issues attributed to the species.

pcs.text: Identify plant health specialist advisor and determine their scope of support and sampling specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify plant health specialist advisor and determine their scope of support and sampling specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify plant health specialist advisor and determine their scope of support and sampling specifications.

pcs.text: Identify and select tools and equipment required to monitor and sample turf plant health according to specialist advice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select tools and equipment required to monitor and sample turf plant health according to specialist advice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select tools and equipment required to monitor and sample turf plant health according to specialist advice.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for monitoring activities

elements.title: Assess the health of turf grass area

pcs.text: Inspect and record signs and symptoms of abnormal turf grass health
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect and record signs and symptoms of abnormal turf grass health?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect and record signs and symptoms of abnormal turf grass health.

pcs.text: Assess extent of turf grass health problem, and report according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess extent of turf grass health problem, and report according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess extent of turf grass health problem, and report according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Conduct field diagnoses and tests to aid in identifying plant health issue
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct field diagnoses and tests to aid in identifying plant health issue?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct field diagnoses and tests to aid in identifying plant health issue.

pcs.text: Collect, secure, label and despatch samples for laboratory testing according to specialist advisor specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect, secure, label and despatch samples for laboratory testing according to specialist advisor specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect, secure, label and despatch samples for laboratory testing according to specialist advisor specifications.

pcs.text: Repair sample sites, clean tools and equipment and dispose of waste materials according to workplace and environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Repair sample sites, clean tools and equipment and dispose of waste materials according to workplace and environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Repair sample sites, clean tools and equipment and dispose of waste materials according to workplace and environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Communicate with specialist advisors to establish diagnoses of plant health problem
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with specialist advisors to establish diagnoses of plant health problem?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with specialist advisors to establish diagnoses of plant health problem.

pcs.text: Assess diagnoses and compare results with acceptable parameters
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess diagnoses and compare results with acceptable parameters?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess diagnoses and compare results with acceptable parameters.

pcs.text: Prepare recommendations to address identified plant health problems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare recommendations to address identified plant health problems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare recommendations to address identified plant health problems.

pcs.text: Examine turf for poor health and substandard quality indicators in a scheduled manner

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine turf for poor health and substandard quality indicators in a scheduled manner.

pcs.text: Identify poor turf health and deviations in turf quality according to expected sporting standards and workplace requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify poor turf health and deviations in turf quality according to expected sporting standards and workplace requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compile examination results and report with recommendations.
